dimension_notes_summary.cross_module_architecture: src/lib/utils/characterData.ts imports from '../../stores' (client Svelte stores), violating boundary: utilities should not depend on framework-specific reactive state
dimension_notes_summary.high_level_elegance: 40+ files with zero importers marked as orphaned across src/lib/db/, src/lib/utils/, src/routes/api/
dimension_notes_summary.convention_outlier: Sibling load() functions use inconsistent type signatures: ServerLoad vs PageServerLoad with varying parameter patterns
dimension_notes_summary.error_consistency: Empty catch blocks in src/auth.ts catch {} without any logging or recovery
dimension_notes_summary.abstraction_fitness: Minimal pass-through wrappers earn their indirection (cn delegates to clsx+twMerge)
dimension_notes_summary.dependency_health: sharp (^0.34.4) in production dependencies but zero imports
dimension_notes_summary.low_level_elegance: Token refresh logic in bnetAccount.ts has clear branching with early returns and precise conditions
dimension_notes_summary.mid_level_elegance: API routes manually destructure and validate request.json with repeated boilerplate validation - no centralized validation
dimension_notes_summary.test_strategy: 11 test files across 580+ source files - test-to-source ratio ~1:50
dimension_notes_summary.api_surface_coherence: Error response pattern inconsistency: POST endpoints use raw Response(JSON.stringify({error}), {status, headers}) while GET endpoints use json({error}, {status})
dimension_notes_summary.authorization_consistency: Auth pattern is consistent: all protected endpoints check session?.user?.id via locals.getSession()
dimension_notes_summary.ai_generated_debt: Identical try-catch-console.error boilerplate across 20+ functions in src/lib/db/ (users.ts, recents.ts, userRecents.ts)
dimension_notes_summary.incomplete_migration: Two coexisting database schemas: src/lib/db/schema.ts (402 LOC, marked orphaned but actively imported) and src/lib/db/userSchema.ts (new, 6 importers)
dimension_notes_summary.package_organization: src/components/ contains 22+ Svelte files at root level mixing layout (seo, footer, header), keystone-calc (apiForm, keystoneTable, scoreExplanation), log-analysis (logBrowser, logBrowserResult, yourR
dimension_notes_summary.initialization_coupling: Module-level mutable state in src/lib/utils/tokenCache.ts: let cachedToken: AccessToken | null = null shared across all requests, called by 17 API routes
dimension_notes_summary.design_coherence: Foundational architecture is clean: layered structure (routes → lib → db), no cycles, auth properly centralized
dimension_notes_summary.contract_coherence: Two exports named addUserRecent with incompatible signatures: recents.ts (userId, item: RecentItem) vs userRecents.ts (userId, type, entityId, entityData, title, subtitle, metadata)
dimension_notes_summary.logic_clarity: scoreFormula switch on stars has cases 1, 2, 3 with no default — implicit fallback to timeAdjustment=0
dimension_notes_summary.type_safety: Unvalidated JSON parsing in 11+ API routes (cast-events, death-events, damage-events, boss-events, healing-events, fights, player-details, recent-reports, recent-characters, browse-logs, current-state

review_issue_summaries.summary: Utility function (characterData.ts) imports from client-side Svelte stores, violating framework-agnostic abstraction boundary
40+ files with zero importers; ownership and purpose undefined
src/lib/utils/ mixes 17 files across 5+ unrelated domains
Data schema defined in 3 locations, unclear which is current
API endpoint naming uses 3 different patterns inconsistently
Two separate database connection functions with unclear distinction
Sibling routes use inconsistent load() signatures: ServerLoad vs PageServerLoad
Sibling API routes handle GraphQL errors inconsistently
Database initialization functions use inconsistent naming despite identical implementation
Empty catch block in auth.ts completely suppresses background roster sync errors
API handlers discard original error details, returning generic 500
Similar operations use contradictory strategies: throw vs null vs empty array
GraphQL errors detected in some handlers but not others
Error handlers fall back to secondary sources without signaling degradation
Error logging is inconsistently applied
Error responses returned to clients have inconsistent shapes and status codes
Generic 'do' prefix in doSave callback hides intent
Generic callback name 'hide' provides no semantic information
Abbreviation 'res' inconsistent with codebase convention 'response'
Generic 'process' in processSeriesData masks transformation intent
Generic 'process' in processData obscures filtering and aggregation
Generic 'temp' prefix in tempScore unclear
Identical token request/expiry logic in oauth.ts and blizzardOauth.ts
4 event handlers share identical request validation, token fetch, error handling - only query template differs
GraphQL query construction repeated across handlers; no shared template
Unused production dependency 'sharp' (^0.34.4) creates bloat with zero code references
Unused production dependency '@internationalized/date' with zero references
Double setLoading(false) in nested finally blocks in recentCharacters.ts
Double setLoading(false) in nested finally in recentReports.ts
Overlapping loading state mutations when add() calls await loadFromAPI()
Dead variable tierSuffix defined but never referenced
Input validation repeated across all API routes with no centralized middleware
Session fetched via HTTP fetch in hooks instead of direct function call
Token caching via module-level singleton not safe for serverless
Fresh postgres client per request - workaround for initialization coupling
Some handlers translate external API responses, others pass raw
All 20+ API route handlers lack test coverage
OAuth token request, caching, refresh logic completely untested
Data fetching utilities and transformations lack coverage
Component tests verify DOM presence but not behavioral correctness
API responses never tested with real component rendering
Error handling branches in API routes never tested
All database CRUD operations and queries lack test coverage
Svelte stores managing app state untested
Test pyramid inverted: shallow unit tests only, no integration/e2e
Error responses use two distinct patterns: json({error},{status}) and raw new Response(JSON.stringify({error}),{status,headers})
Similar operations accept parameters in different orders: character-score (region,realm,name) vs blizzard/raiderio (name,region,realm)
Similar endpoints return data with inconsistent wrapping: direct arrays, {runs:[]}, {seriesData}, {deathEvents}
API routes lack JSDoc documenting failure modes; character-score has 6+ retry chains with undocumented error behavior
addUserRecent and similar db functions accept entityData: any and metadata: any at critical boundaries

dimension_notes_summary.low_level_elegance: Auth/token plumbing (src/lib/auth/oauthBase.ts, tokenCacheBase.ts, tokenCache.ts, blizzardTokenCache.ts, oauth.ts, blizzardOauth.ts) is a model of balanced extraction: a single createTokenCache() fact

review_issue_summaries.summary: browse-logs handler uses `let` + implicit any[] for variables that are never reassigned, slightly muddying the locally-scoped state intent
currentState.saveToAPI wraps its fetch in a `const doSave = async () => {…}; doSave();` IIFE for no reason
scoreFormula rebuilds an affix-breakpoint lookup on every call, and computeRunLevelsForScore has an unreachable trailing return
